cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently praise the company for offering competitive wages and solid benefits, making it a desirable option for part-time or student work.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members report a supportive and friendly team atmosphere that fosters a sense of belonging and effective collaboration.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: The fast-paced nature of the work, combined with high performance expectations, leads to significant stress and physical exhaustion for some associates.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of reviews highlights serious concerns regarding toxic management, favoritism, and a lack of accountability when addressing workplace grievances.
